description_long: This is an acoustic guitar with a classic cutaway body design, featuring a sunburst finish that transitions from a deep brown at the edges to a lighter amber in the center. The top of the body has a visible soundhole and a dark bridge, while the neck is adorned with inlaid fret markers. The headstock is equipped with gold tuning pegs and appears to have a standard six-string configuration. The back and sides of the guitar are finished in a darker, glossy brown, contrasting with the lighter top. The instrument's contours are smooth and rounded, with a pronounced waist and a single cutaway for easier access to higher frets. This guitar is likely constructed primarily from wood, with metal hardware and plastic or synthetic components for the tuning pegs and fretboard inlays.
description: A sunburst-finished acoustic guitar with a cutaway body, gold tuning pegs, and inlaid fret markers. The body features a smooth, glossy finish with a visible soundhole and bridge.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the dark, glossy back and the neck extending to the headstock.
description_view_1: Angled rear view highlighting the guitar's curved body and the transition from the back to the sides.
description_view_2: Front angled view displaying the soundhole, bridge, fretboard with inlays, and the sunburst finish.
description_view_3: Front angled view with a clear look at the cutaway, soundhole, bridge, and detailed fretboard.
attribute_headstock_design: Standard acoustic headstock with three tuning pegs on each side, gold hardware, and no visible logo.
